name: notestorelab-codex-plugin
description: Case-root review workflow and bounded MCP launcher for NoteStore Lab.

interface.shortDescription: Review one Apple Notes case root with bounded MCP help.
interface.longDescription: Bundle the NoteStore Lab review workflow, one-case-root-at-a-time MCP launcher, and a case-review skill without turning the repo into a hosted platform.
defaultPrompt: Use NoteStore Lab to inspect the review_index before forming conclusions.
Use NoteStore Lab to answer one bounded question from derived artifacts, not the live Notes store.
